text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, in an effort to become stronger, Copano
Rickey begins searching for Umamusume whose
help she can count on. However...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
What? You want me to help you train? I know I
said people willing to help are important, but...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Sorry... I can't help you. I made a goal-oriented
schedule and there's no turning back now. I just
don't have the time.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oohoo, you'd like me to help you train? Well, I'd
be more than happy to.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You would?! Thanks, Acute! ☆ Okay, in that case,
let's do a scrimmage right away.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: HRAAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Eeep... Trainer, she's way too strong. I can't even keep up with her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wonder Acute might have a grandmotherly
demeanor, but she's also one of the most
prominent powerhouses you'll see on the dirt
track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's entered around thirty races, and while she
hasn't won a G1 race yet, she has come in second
twice. She's also won three graded races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, she's had some incredibly close
races against Smart Falcon, another renowned
dirt racer. Basically, Copano Rickey isn't ready to
pair run with someone at that level.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... So, even if someone agrees to train with
me, we won't be able to help each other grow
unless we have a good dynamic.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I think I need to find a racer who either just
debuted or is close to it...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I can't think of any runners who can wield
their full power on the dirt without any trouble.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither can I. Hokko Tarumae and Wonder Acute
are the only two who come to mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But if it's a special connection we're looking for...
choice_data_list: Can't feng shui give us any hints?
Can't feng shui give us any hints?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hints? ...Now that you mention it, I did see that
my lucky color was black.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like that's all we have to go on. I guess I
could look for students with black hair or
something...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Rickey!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Kita! Of course! Why didn't I think of that? ☆
choice_data_list: Do you two know each other?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep! We used to play in the same park when we
were kids!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Is that true, Kita?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! This was back before I met you, Dia! Rickey
and I always used to race each other!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I lost my toys in the sandbox, Rickey
always found them for me right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is Copano Rickey's underclassman.
Her kindhearted nature has earned her the
nickname "clutch captain".

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The word "Black" is literally in her name. I called
her out here to see if things clicked... but it
sounds like they go way back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And this is Satono Diamond. She's Kitasan Black's
best friend and the heiress of the Satono Group.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Kita? I'm actually looking for someone to
train with me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Do you think you could be that someone?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Of course! If it's help you need, it's help I'll
give! ♪ And...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm especially happy to be helping you, Rickey!
You were such a good friend and play pal when
we were kids!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. ☆ Thinking back on the times we played
together, and that park, too... It really takes me
back.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I remember there being so many adults and older
girls that would look after us.

text_block_list.name: Caretaker
text_block_list.text:
Now then, I got rid of those dangerous fences so
you two won't get hurt.

text_block_list.name: Caretaker
text_block_list.text:
Now you can run around without worrying about
crashing into them.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! They were so good to us. It's thanks to
them that we got to run around as much as we
liked!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Kita, let's run together again! Just like we did
back then!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We'll run as fast as we used to, like the
good old days back in that park!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um, would you mind if I lent my assistance as
well?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, you too, Dia?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Why, yes. I do believe some training is easier to
do with three people.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'd be delighted to help, if you'll have me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Sure, thanks a bunch, Dia! In that case, I'm
looking forward to working with you, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's best friend, Satono Diamond,
readily agrees to help out as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon, the bond between the three of them grows
stronger with each passing day.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's make the most of today's session, too,
Rickey! I've been looking forward to it since this
morning!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What does today's feng shui look like?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Today's feng shui... "Metal will clash
with wood." So it looks like your wood affinity
isn't great today, Dia.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wood isn't great today... In that case!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's run on the woodchip track! Trust me. I'll be
just fine!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Your feng shui really is amazing, Rickey. It's so reliable!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It really motivates me to overcome the challenges
it identifies! I just love it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... It looks like she's really taken a liking to
you...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it kiiind of feels like you're stealing her
away a little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Satono Diamond's fixation on
breaking jinxes has helped her and Copano
Rickey build a great dynamic.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I think the three of us can really hit
the dirt running! And it's all thanks to you. ♪
choice_data_list: Let's work on refining your running as we go!
Let's work on refining your running as we go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them form a triad of runners who
complement each other's training perfectly.
They're all helping each other improve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having forged some new bonds, Copano Rickey's
horizons have broadened greatly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way home later that day...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh... It's her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey comes to a stop in front of the
academy gates. I follow her gaze to see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A student and her trainer parting ways.

text_block_list.name: Departing Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Thank you for everything.

text_block_list.name: Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome. But I'm sad to see you go. I
never thought you'd leave racing behind of your
own volition...

text_block_list.name: Departing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I don't have a choice. My injury's healed, but my
situation's still hopeless... Well, goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The former student thanks her trainer as she
leaves. But right then...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Copano Rickey calls out, unable to stay quiet.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Are you having trouble with your running? If
you're struggling to stay optimistic, then...

text_block_list.name: Departing Umamusume
text_block_list.text: If this is a pep talk, it's half a year late...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: H-half a year?

text_block_list.name: Departing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
At first, I thought the worries were just all in my
head, but then my appetite disappeared... and I
started staying up too late...

text_block_list.name: Departing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
My trainer was always there for me, but then I felt
guilty for dumping all my problems on someone
else.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh... I see...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Um! In that case!

text_block_list.name: Departing Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I've already found a job.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Departing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to use this as an opportunity to start
over.

text_block_list.name: Departing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure I just didn't have enough talent...
and I've accepted that.

text_block_list.name: Departing Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for worrying you. Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A melancholic smile lingers on her face as she
walks away. Today's far from the first time I've
witnessed such a scene at Tracen Academy...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: There must've been something... I could've done.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Like, red in the east. She could've tried
waking up as the sun rose every morning.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
A lot of getting back on track starts with little
efforts like that...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But if I can't reach out and help them, all I can do
is watch them go. And I've seen so many go since
I started at Tracen...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I want to do something to help. Even if it's not
possible right now, there has to be something I
can do...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to get stronger and spread feng
shui! I want to help as many people as I can, as
soon as possible!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We have to do our best, Trainer! Together with
Kita and Dia!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Strength for the sake of victory alone isn't what
interests her—she wants to build up the kind of
strength that can support others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In this moment, the fire in Copano Rickey's eyes is
blazing hotter than the crimson of the setting sun.
